history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person, seen from behind, takes a selfie in a dimly lit, somewhat grimy public restroom. They are wearing a black hoodie, and the back of their head and hair are brightly illuminated by a strong light source behind them, creating a halo effect. The person is holding up a smartphone to take the picture. The background is a textured, tiled wall. To the left, a gray urinal is visible. To the right of the person, a tall, dark cylindrical trash can stands near the wall. The foreground features a bathroom sink with a marble countertop that has a rich, reddish-brown and black swirling pattern. A shiny chrome faucet is prominently positioned over the white sink basin. The overall lighting is dramatic, with strong backlighting creating silhouettes and highlights. The mood is somewhat mysterious and moody, with a hint of urban decay. The color palette is dominated by dark tones, contrasted with the bright light and the warm colors of the marble. The image has a grainy, film-like quality.
